channel.title: Validations on Ocean Model Validation
channel.description: Recent content in Validations on Ocean Model Validation

item.title: AMM7 — Analysis Overview
item.description:
AMM7 Analysis Overview

This page summarises the analyses available for the AMM7 area, organised by type. Use the table of contents to jump to a specific section.

Tidal Analysis

  • TPXO9 — 2019-2022

    Constituent Amp err (m) Phase err (°)
    M2 0.121 14.5
    S2 0.038 14.3
    K1 0.023 27.1
    O1 0.013 18.0
    • 2019-2022

Horizontal Surface Validation

  • Baseline — 2016-2023

    Variable Dataset RMSE Bias Corr
    SALT CCI-SSS 1.003 +0.276 0.60
    TEMP CCI-SST 0.901 +0.384 0.96
    TEMP OSTIA 0.916 +0.392 0.97
    • 2016-2023

Horizontal Bottom Layer Validation

No horizontal bottom-layer validation has been performed for this area yet.

item.title: NS — Analysis Overview
item.description:
NS Analysis Overview

This page summarises the analyses available for the NS area, organised by type. Use the table of contents to jump to a specific section.

Tidal Analysis

No tidal analysis has been performed for this area yet.

Horizontal Surface Validation

Ranking

  • SSR_STR — 2016-2023–2023

    Variable Dataset RMSE Bias Corr
    SALT CCI-SSS 1.943 +0.476 0.84
    TEMP CCI-SST 1.095 +0.215 0.86
    TEMP OSTIA 1.107 +0.117 0.83
    • 2016-2023 · 2016 · 2017 · 2018 · 2019 · 2020 · 2021 · 2022 · 2023

  • SSRD_STRD — 2016-2023–2023

item.title: MLE Comparison — NS
item.description:
MLE Cross-Experiment Comparison — NS

SVD-reduced maximum-likelihood ranking of model experiments against a common observation footprint.

Ranking

experiment log_likelihood rank delta_log_L aic explained_variance_captured
CMEMS -0.47744861075687495 1 0.0 2.95489722151375 0.9982603704617522
Adaptive_1 -0.4962894771279569 2 -0.018840866371081955 2.992578954255914 0.9982603704617522
Adaptive_2 -0.49701507963581465 3 -0.019566468878939702 2.994030159271629 0.9982603704617522
Adaptive_3 -0.49744885826267254 4 -0.020000247505797597 2.994897716525345 0.9982603704617522
Baseline -0.49964843432705375 5 -0.0221998235701788 2.9992968686541075 0.9982603704617522
SSR_STR -0.5020275563496825 6 -0.0245789455928076 3.004055112699365 0.9982603704617522
ObsKd -0.5136927067654155 7 -0.036244096008540505 3.0273854135308307 0.9982603704617522
SSRD_STRD -0.5164292767745293 8 -0.038980666017654375 3.0328585535490586 0.9982603704617522

Diagnostic Plots

item.title: NS - Experiment CMEMS
item.description:
Horizontal Validation results comparing model output against observations.

Experiment Information

Area: NS Experiment: CMEMS Validation Type: Horizontal Validation Variables: SALT_BOTTOM, TEMP_BOTTOM, SALT_SURFACE, TEMP_SURFACE

Overview

Metric SALT_BOTTOM / NWS-salinity TEMP_BOTTOM / NWS-bottomT SALT_SURFACE / CCI-SSS TEMP_SURFACE / OSTIA TEMP_SURFACE / CCI-SST
RMSE 0.4879 1.4122 1.9640 0.9799 0.9884
Bias 0.0749 -0.6136 0.3060 0.1148 0.2803
Corr 0.8398 0.9208 0.8298 0.8797 0.8873
N points 58,068 58,068 16,531,480 2,003,850 17,213,415

Annual Statistics Trends

item.title: AMM7 - TPXO9 - Tidal Analysis
item.description:
Harmonic analysis of sea surface elevation compared with satellite products and tide gauge observations.

Analysis Summary

Analyzed Constituents: K1, K2, M2, N2, O1, P1, Q1, S2
Analysis Date: 2026-04-30 Satellite Product: FES2014/TPXO9

Plots

Tide Gauge Station Map

GESLA tide gauge station locations

K₁ (lunar-solar diurnal) — amplitude/phase comparison with GESLA tide gauges

K₂ (lunar-solar semi-diurnal) — amplitude/phase comparison with GESLA tide gauges

item.title: ENA4 - TPXO9 - Tidal Analysis
item.description:
Harmonic analysis of sea surface elevation compared with satellite products and tide gauge observations.

Analysis Summary

Analyzed Constituents: M2, S2, K1, O1
Analysis Date: 2026-03-31 Satellite Product: FES2014/TPXO9

Plots

Methodology

Harmonic Analysis

Tidal constituents extracted using UTide harmonic analysis package. Analysis performed on high-frequency model output (10-15 min resolution) over a minimum period of 60 days.

Satellite Comparison

Model results compared with satellite-derived tidal products:

  • FES2014: Finite Element Solution 2014 (1/16° resolution)
  • TPXO9: OSU Tidal Prediction Software (1/30° resolution)

Satellite data regridded to model grid using conservative interpolation.

item.title: ENA8 - TPXO9 - Tidal Analysis
item.description:
Harmonic analysis of sea surface elevation compared with satellite products and tide gauge observations.

Analysis Summary

Analyzed Constituents: M2, S2, K1, O1
Analysis Date: 2026-03-31 Satellite Product: FES2014/TPXO9

Plots

Methodology

Harmonic Analysis

Tidal constituents extracted using UTide harmonic analysis package. Analysis performed on high-frequency model output (10-15 min resolution) over a minimum period of 60 days.

Satellite Comparison

Model results compared with satellite-derived tidal products:

  • FES2014: Finite Element Solution 2014 (1/16° resolution)
  • TPXO9: OSU Tidal Prediction Software (1/30° resolution)

Satellite data regridded to model grid using conservative interpolation.
